title: tabIndex values should be 0 or -1
description: "tabIndex" values should be 0 or -1Analyze your codeconsistency-conventionalmaintainabilityreliabilityCode SmellaccessibilityreactWhy is this an issue?How can I fix it?More InfoPositivetabIndexvalues can disrupt the natural tab order of the webpage. This can be confusing for screen reader users who rely on a logical tab order to navigate through the content. If the tab order doesn’t match the visual or logical order of elements, users may struggle to understand the page structure.Therefore, it’s recommended to avoid using positivetabIndexvalues.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIAvailable Since10.4Analyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable
recommendation: Refactor to eliminate the flagged pattern.

checks.message: tabIndex values should be 0 or -1. Positive values disrupt natural tab order and harm accessibility
